title: trisetaria aurea
intro: Trisetaria aurea, also known as Yellow Oat Grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Trisetaria aurea include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Trisetaria aurea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
